sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85109" key="polunhnemi/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-νηνεμίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85109.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">great calm,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παλι-</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.102</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Bass.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
